locations.name: Chaîne de la Selle
locations.summary: Chaîne de la Selle (French pronunciation: [ʃɛn də la sɛl]) is a mountain range in Haiti, on the island of Hispaniola.

relations.subject: Antillean siskin
relations.evidence: In Haiti it is found in the far west in the Massif de la Hotte and in the southeast in the Massif de la Selle

relations.subject: Antillean siskin
relations.evidence: In Haiti it is found in the far west in the Massif de la Hotte and in the southeast in the Massif de la Selle

relations.subject: Antillean siskin
relations.evidence: It is also found north of there in the Dominican Republic in the Sierra de Neiba and further northeast in the Cordillera Central. It inhabits pine forest and the edges of moist broadleaf forest and also grassy clearings in them. In elevation it mostly ranges between but is found as low as in very cold weather
